title: Companion — Closed Apertures
medium: six ComfyUI photographic plates (RealVisXL V5.0) from M. Eames' personal binder, kept since 1994: bricked-up window, eliminated dormer, reduced storefront, exposed party-wall flank, empty lot with foundation outline, sided-over door. Each plate carries entry number, address, aperture type, occasion, and a marginalia note in M.E.'s pencil.
caption: I do not know what the binder is for, exactly. But I have used it. — M. E.
